description: Autonomous mission queue. Orchestrator polls this file and executes missions in priority order. Sovereign is only paged for IMPLEMENTATION ratification, HARD_FAIL, or MAX_RETRIES.

missions.rationale: ANDON CORD — Article VI.2 Substrate Integrity Violation. opsec_rag_scout.py landed as websocket_handler.py. Forensic trail broken. Fix before Zoo opens.
missions.constitutional_basis: Article VI — Zero Technical Debt Tolerance

missions.rationale: Permanent fix: auto-create prompt splinter on version bump. Ends Gate 5 chase forever.

Zoo first epoch — 5 strategy variants bred for drawdown resistance and risk-adjusted return (Sharpe/Sortino). Selection pressure: survive 15% max drawdown, minimize volatility drag. Breed unkillable macro-survivors, not fragile sprinters. — REQUEUED as STRATEGIC_ARCHITECTURE after routing failure. 32b required. — SOVEREIGN EDITION: Supreme Council authored directly. 32b timeout on 8GB VRAM. Hardware constraint converted to quality opportunity.

selection_pressure.anti_target: do NOT optimize for absolute return at expense of drawdown

missions.rationale: Zoo Epoch 1: ZOO_E1_001 VOLATILITY_GATEKEEPER. ATR gate circuit breaker. Entry only when vol contracting. Hard stop 2x ATR.
Zoo Epoch 1: ZOO_E1_002 MEAN_REVERSION_SNIPER. VWAP + RSI double confirmation mean reversion. Exit at VWAP midline.
Zoo Epoch 1: ZOO_E1_003 REGIME_CHAMELEON. ADX dead-band regime switching. Trend mode EMA cross, ranging mode Bollinger.
Zoo Epoch 1: ZOO_E1_004 OPENING_RANGE_BREAKOUT. First 30min range breakout with volume confirmation. One trade per session.
Zoo Epoch 1: ZOO_E1_005 MOMENTUM_DECAY_HARVESTER. Pullback entry after momentum spike. Buys consolidation bar, not the spike.
